tool_args.label: 2023 Annual Ridership Report – April 2024
tool_args.raw_text: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics Reports - recurring
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.description: Recurring monthly Key Performance Metrics Reports presented to the Metro-North Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
